modules.name: Attenuate
modules.description: Single-channel CV attenuator. OUT = IN x SCALE.

modules.name: Cassette
modules.description: Tape loop cassette player. 4 loop presets (CHORD/PAD/BASS/LEAD), tape quality modes (NEW/WORN/OLD), variable speed ±2 octaves, forward/reverse. Animated reel window.

modules.name: Crinkle
modules.description: Buchla 259-inspired wavefolder oscillator. Triangle core, 5-stage parallel center-clipper fold.

modules.name: Ladder
modules.description: TB-303-lineage Huovilainen nonlinear ladder filter with SPREAD/SHAPE pole topology control.

modules.name: Noise
modules.description: Six spectral noise generators: White, Pink, Brown, Blue, Violet, Crackle. Output only.

modules.name: Saphire
modules.description: Fixed-IR convolution reverb with operator transformations. Lex Hall IR, TIME/BEND/TONE/PRE controls.

modules.name: Sonic
modules.description: BBE-inspired spectral-phase maximizer. 3-band phase alignment + spectral tilt for perceived clarity and punch.

modules.name: Steel
modules.description: AI-driven wavetable stacker. Sidechain FFT analysis feeds Gemma inference to mix 16 wavetables in real time.

modules.name: BusCrush
modules.description: 8-channel summing bus with Mackie-style overload. Asymmetric rail clipping, envelope-dependent headroom, 8x oversampled bus stage. Pan CV per channel, stereo out.

modules.name: ClockDiv
modules.description: Clock divider with /2, /4, /8, /16, /32 outputs. Replacement for Autodafe/ClockDivider (not available on macOS ARM64).

modules.name: Tonnetz
modules.description: Trigger-addressed Tonnetz chord generator. Navigates a 5x5 lattice to produce voice-led triads. CV-controlled center, spread, and focus.

modules.name: Maurizio
modules.description: Clock-syncable dub delay with dotted/triplet ratio, HP-filtered feedback, and tape saturation. Basic Channel-style deep echo.
